name: Imperial Metals Corporation
description: Imperial Metals Corporation is a Vancouver-based mining company engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of base and precious metals, primarily copper and gold. Its key assets include 100% interests in the Mount Polley and Huckleberry copper-gold mines in British Columbia, as well as a 30% interest in the Red Chris copper-gold mine in northwest BC. The company is an established mid-tier copper producer with multiple operating mines in British Columbia.
